description: Multi-tenancy / Organization Support + Compliance / Audit Infrastructure - Create packages/organizations/ (org CRUD, member management, middleware for org context), packages/audit/ (audit logger, GDPR data export/deletion, retention policies), add Prisma models (Organization, OrganizationMember, Workspace, AuditLog), wire into server-core, and add admin panel pages for audit logs and compliance.
steps: Add Organization, OrganizationMember, Workspace, AuditLog models to packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma. Organization: id, name, slug (unique), plan (FREE/PRO/ENTERPRISE enum), settings Json, createdAt, updatedAt. OrganizationMember: id, orgId, userId, role (OWNER/ADMIN/MEMBER enum), joinedAt. Workspace: id, orgId, name, settings Json, createdAt. AuditLog: id, userId, orgId?, action, resource, resourceId?, metadata Json, ip, userAgent, timestamp, createdAt. Add proper relations and indexes.
Create packages/organizations/package.json - @quant/organizations, deps: @quant/database, @quant/common, zod
Create packages/organizations/tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts
Create packages/organizations/src/types.ts - Org, OrgMember, OrgContext, OrgRole, OrgPlan, Workspace types
Create packages/organizations/src/org-service.ts - OrgService: createOrg(), getOrg(), updateOrg(), deleteOrg(), listOrgs(). Validates slug uniqueness.
Create packages/organizations/src/member-service.ts - MemberService: invite(orgId, userId, role), remove(orgId, userId), changeRole(orgId, userId, newRole), listMembers(orgId)
Create packages/organizations/src/middleware.ts - extractOrgContext: reads X-Organization-Id header or subdomain, resolves org, attaches to request. Exports as fastify-plugin.
Create packages/organizations/src/index.ts - export all
Create packages/audit/package.json - @quant/audit, deps: @quant/database, @quant/common, zod
Create packages/audit/tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts
Create packages/audit/src/types.ts - AuditEvent, AuditAction enum (LOGIN, LOGOUT, DATA_ACCESS, DATA_MODIFY, DATA_DELETE, PERMISSION_CHANGE, SETTINGS_CHANGE), RetentionPolicy types
Create packages/audit/src/audit-logger.ts - AuditLogger class: log(event), query(filters), getByUser(userId). Writes to Prisma AuditLog table.
Create packages/audit/src/data-export.ts - DataExporter: exportUserData(userId) - collects all user data across tables, returns JSON bundle
Create packages/audit/src/data-deletion.ts - DataDeletion: deleteUserData(userId) - cascading delete across all user-related tables, logs the deletion event
Create packages/audit/src/retention-policy.ts - RetentionManager: applyRetention(policy) - deletes records older than policy.maxAge, configurable per resource type
Create packages/audit/src/index.ts - export all
Create packages/server-core/src/plugins/organizations.ts - fastify-plugin that decorates request.org with OrgContext, uses middleware from @quant/organizations
Create packages/server-core/src/plugins/audit.ts - fastify-plugin that decorates fastify.audit with AuditLogger instance, auto-logs auth events
Export both new plugins from packages/server-core/src/index.ts
Create apps/admin/src/app/audit/page.tsx - audit log viewer with table, filters (date range, action, user), pagination
Create apps/admin/src/app/compliance/page.tsx - GDPR section: data export requests, data deletion requests, retention policy configuration
Create apps/admin/src/app/api/audit/route.ts - GET with query params for filtering audit logs
Create apps/admin/src/app/api/compliance/route.ts - POST export-data, POST delete-data, GET/PUT retention-policy
Create packages/organizations/src/__tests__/org-service.test.ts - test org CRUD
Create packages/audit/src/__tests__/audit-logger.test.ts - test log/query operations
Create packages/audit/src/__tests__/retention-policy.test.ts - test retention enforcement
acceptance_criteria: Prisma schema has Organization, OrganizationMember, Workspace, AuditLog models with proper relations
packages/organizations exports OrgService, MemberService, org context middleware
packages/audit exports AuditLogger, DataExporter, DataDeletion, RetentionManager
server-core has organizations and audit plugins registered
Admin audit page shows filterable log table
Admin compliance page has GDPR data export/deletion UI
API routes handle audit log queries and compliance operations
pnpm turbo typecheck passes across entire monorepo
